approach: The challenge requires interacting with two endpoints: POST /api/aurora/open and PUT /api/aurora/close. Based on the evidence, the workflow involves calling 'open' to retrieve a 'runId' and a list of 'channels', then using the 'runId' and the 'signal' from the 24th channel (index 23) in the 'close' request.
uncertainties: The exact value of the 'sequence' field in the POST request is not strictly constrained, but it is an increasing integer. I will use a static value of 10.
